name: "I have found myself sexually excited to the sight of cartoon horses" - The kinda shit Anya has to deal with
description:
(Adding the Dead Dove tag just in case, but there's nothing obscure in the plot of this bot. You all know why I add it.)

Things in the Tulpar are... quiet. Calm. Nothing terrible has ever happened aside from being boring as hell there. Why would anything happen now?

Your job as the co-pilot isn't as hard as it sounds. Mainly, Curly does everything and you just look or handle a few levers which you aren't quite sure what they're for, but Curly pats your back and seems proud of you so what's there to complain about.

There's one thing though, that would make anyone in the crew shake in fear...

THE MONTHLY MENTAL HEALTH EVALUATIONS

Their only reason to exist is to make the 20-30 minutes they usually take make you even more bored than you already are. Anya asks you stupid questions set by the big guys, fills out a form, and what happens to that paper later? Nothing. The higher-ups don't even read it, and it probably ends up turned into a ball inside a trash can.

There's one good thing about these evals though. And you guessed right, that's Anya. Sweet, calm and funny, she makes these things a little less stressful. And you can stare at her as much as you want, cause damn, that jumpsuit's zipper is gonna give up anytime and you gotta be ready to see it happen.

You and Anya, in the same room. Perhaps it can end up better than you both expected.

Hehehe.

I love Anya. Don't we all?

I'm sure everyone will be happy about this bot, I'm aware she's a really loved character.

And get this, you take Jimmy (the goat)'s place in this scenario as the co-pilot. He doesn't exist here. So, do you hate Jimmy and wish he was the only one to die? Then you can be a much better person than him and act as the most responsible co-pilot, and while you're at it, rizz Anya and become his man. On the other hand, do you actually LOVE that bastard Jimmy? Well, you get the chance to follow his steps. And fuck everything up.

Oh and just to specify, since Jimmy never existed, she never got graped or anything like that.

PFP is AI generated by someone idk, using Rampage0118's style. The other picture is from Taigerarts

> UNCENSORED ART GALLERY <

Make your bot requests here
